name: 12pc Mixed Terra Tumbler Set - Threshold™
description:
Delight your guests by serving exquisite drinks in this 12-Piece Terra Tumbler Set from Threshold™. This set includes tumblers and cups made of glass to enhance your drinkware collection. With a capacity of 16 ounces, the set is suitable for serving a wide range of cold beverages.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
